text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm so glad you're enjoying our claw
machine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but you did great! Once you get
the hang of it, you'll be a claw machine master in
no time at all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to have a contest to see who can win
the most prizes someday... Hehe. I'm looking
forward to it.
